name: codex-ssh-bridge
description: Operate allowlisted SSH hosts through a local native bridge without installing or authenticating Codex remotely.

interface.shortDescription: Operate allowlisted SSH hosts from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex, SSH credentials, and approvals on the local machine while a native Rust MCP server exposes bounded remote file and command tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Remote SSH Ops to inspect my configured devbox.
Run the tests on my configured SSH host and explain failures.
